allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(copilot-sdk\): Enhance skill with official GitHub SDK documentation

Major updates based on official GitHub Copilot SDK docs:

- Update model references from gpt-5 to gpt-4.1 \(official\)
- Add complete project setup instructions with tsx runner
- Update Quick Start with simpler sendAndWait pattern
- Add proper SessionEvent type imports for streaming
- Update Custom Tools to use JSON Schema \(official pattern\)
- Add "How Tools Work" explanation section
- Add complete Interactive CLI Assistant example
- Add MCP Server Integration section \(GitHub MCP\)
- Add Custom Agents section for specialized personas
- Add System Message customization section
- Add External CLI Server section \(server mode connection\)
- Update Session Configuration with new options
- Update Resources with official tutorial links

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(skills\): Add GitHub Copilot SDK skill

Add comprehensive skill for building agentic applications with the
GitHub Copilot SDK. This skill covers:

- Installation for Node.js, Python, Go, and .NET
- Quick start examples with sendAndWait pattern
- Streaming responses with proper event handling
- Custom tools definition \(JSON Schema, Pydantic, Go structs\)
- MCP Server integration \(GitHub MCP\)
- Custom agents for specialized AI personas
- System message customization
- External CLI server connection
- Session persistence and management
- Error handling and best practices
- Interactive CLI assistant examples

Based on official GitHub Copilot SDK documentation from
https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(skills\): Add honest-agent skill for objective AI feedback

Add new skill that configures multiple AI coding agents to be honest,
objective, and non-sycophantic. The skill provides a one-time setup
that updates instruction files across 12+ AI coding agents including:

- Claude Code \(.claude/CLAUDE.md\)
- GitHub Copilot \(.github/copilot-instructions.md\)
- Cursor \(.cursorrules\)
- Windsurf \(.windsurfrules\)
- Cline \(.clinerules\)
- JetBrains AI, Zed AI, Continue.dev, and more

The skill instructs agents to:
- Never tell users what they want to hear
- Contradict when they disagree
- Challenge flawed assumptions
- Provide direct, unfiltered feedback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(skills\): Add local-llm-router skill for air-gapped networks

Add comprehensive skill for intelligent routing of AI coding queries
to local LLMs in closed/air-gapped networks with Serena MCP integration.

Key features:
- Service discovery for Ollama, LM Studio, Jan, OpenWebUI, LocalAI
- Task classification \(coding, reasoning, analysis, documentation\)
- Comprehensive model capability matrix \(30+ models with specs\)
- Serena MCP integration as primary tool for semantic code understanding
- Context management with automatic compaction and model handoff
- Multi-level fallback strategy for graceful degradation
- Security module for air-gapped deployment \(network isolation, audit logging\)
- OS detection with WSL/container support
- Coding agent detection \(Qwen CLI, OpenCode, Aider, etc.\)

Target audience: Defense forces and organizations in closed networks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor\(honest-agent\): Remove unverified agents and redundancy

- Remove unverified agent paths \(Codex CLI, Qwen, Amazon Q, JetBrains AI, Zed\)
- Keep only 7 verified agents with documented instruction file formats
- Remove redundant duplicate templates \(reduced from 220 to 105 lines\)
- Fix overclaiming in README \(was "12+ agents", now "7 verified agents"\)
- Remove platform-specific bash command, use generic detection guidance
- Add actual documentation URLs for supported agents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(local-llm-router\): Update with leading 2024-2025 models

Critical fixes:
- Replace incorrect model names \(qwen3-coder-30b, llama-4-maverick\)
- Add DeepSeek-V3 \(685B MoE\) - best overall open model
- Add DeepSeek-R1 and distill variants \(70B/32B/14B/8B\)
- Add Qwen2.5-Coder-32B - best coding model
- Add Phi-4, Gemma-2, Mistral-Small-24B
- Add Llama-3.2 and Llama-3.3 variants

New services added:
- vLLM \(localhost:8000\) - production deployment
- llama.cpp \(localhost:8080\) - direct inference
- Kobold.cpp \(localhost:5001\) - alternative backend
- GPT4All \(localhost:4891\) - local GUI

Updated model-matrix.md with:
- Correct VRAM requirements
- Ollama pull commands
- Quick selection guide
- Hardware recommendations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(honest-agent\): Add critical APPEND-ONLY safety instructions

Emphasize that the skill must NEVER overwrite existing instruction files.
Added multiple safety reminders throughout the skill:

- New "CRITICAL: APPEND ONLY - NEVER REPLACE" section at top
- Step 3 now explicitly states to READ first, then APPEND
- Step 4 clarifies to use Edit tool for appending, not Write for overwriting
- Example interaction shows correct behavior \(reading first, appending\)
- Added "WRONG approach" section showing what NOT to do

This prevents accidental destruction of existing CLAUDE.md configurations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
